rationale: The cited 2000 paper is thematically close to the citing 2003 paper (both analyze promotion effects in scanner data, including tuna, and both address net promotion effects versus dynamic/acceleration components), so it could plausibly serve as a mechanism or prior-results source rather than a purely incidental mention. However, the provided match evidence is only a bare DOI reference with no in-text citation context, so substantive use cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
